puzzle.title: The Harmony of Iron and Praise
puzzle.intro: A divinely favored soul was granted both wisdom and dominion, leading a nation with justice. This unique individual possessed a voice that could command nature and hands that could shape the hardest of materials. Yet, their greatest strength was found in constant remembrance and praise of their Lord. Can you identify this servant of Allah?
clues: The mountains and birds were commanded to join me in my glorification of Allah.
I was given a book of scripture, a guide for my people.
In a dispute over a flock of sheep, my judgment was guided by a wisdom that even my own child recognized as superior.
Allah softened iron for me, allowing me to fashion it with my own hands into coats of mail.
I was tested concerning two litigants who climbed over the wall of my private chamber to seek my judgment.
My son, Sulayman, inherited my kingdom and my wisdom, continuing a legacy of prophecy and rule.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: Prophet Musa
Prophet 'Isa
Prophet Dawud
Dhul-Qarnayn
Talut (Saul)

trial.label: What Was My Significant Event?
options: Building a wall against Gog and Magog
Being tested by two litigants
Leading an army across the sea
Being raised to the heavens
Confronting a tyrant who claimed to give life and death

location.label: What Was a Key Element?
options: A staff that turned into a serpent
A wooden ark
Softened Iron
A transported throne
A clay bird brought to life

outcome.label: What Was the Outcome?
options: I was swallowed by a giant fish
My son Sulayman inherited the kingdom
I was sold into slavery in Egypt
My people were destroyed by a wind
I was thrown into a fire
outcome.answer: My son Sulayman inherited the kingdom

puzzle.arabic: أَنِ ٱعْمَلْ سَـٰبِغَـٰتٍۢ وَقَدِّرْ فِى ٱلسَّرْدِ ۖ وَٱعْمَلُوا۟ صَـٰلِحًا ۖ إِنِّى بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌۭ
puzzle.verse: [Commanding him], "Make full coats of mail and calculate [precisely] the links, and work [all of you] righteousness. Indeed I, of what you do, am Seeing." (34:11)
